title: Meditation & the Trance Method
summary: The meditative trance through which the sessions themselves are produced.
markdown:
**Meditation** and the **trance method** are the practice that makes the archive itself
possible. It is through a meditative trance that [Kosol Ouch](/lore/kosol-ouch/) sets aside his
ordinary awareness and lets [Unimetrix 1](/lore/unimetrix-1/) — and the many other voices — speak
through him.

In the sessions, meditation is also taught as a tool for the listener: a means to raise
[vibration](/lore/vibration-frequency/), to connect with the
[collective consciousness](/lore/collective-consciousness/), and to open the perception used in
"remote [stargate](/lore/stargate/) travel." The [Source-Coil Device](/lore/source-coil-device/)
and [Baramay](/lore/baramay/) are described as supports for this same shift in state.

The trance method is the archive's foundation-stone — the discipline that turns a person into a
channel, and makes the whole conversation with Unimetrix 1 possible.
